nonBlockingIssues.description: The send_event result is discarded with 'let _ ='. While EventLoopProxy::send_event is non-blocking, adding debug logging could help diagnose wake timing issues in production.
The 'No idle_since set yet' else branch may never execute since idle_since is initialized to Some(Instant::now()) in both GuiManagerApp::new() variants. Defensive branch is reasonable for edge cases.

appliedUpdates.description: Added documentation of the create_native+run_app pattern for capturing EventLoopProxy in eframe 0.33.3. This pattern is essential for wake-on-message mechanism and was discovered through docs.rs exploration during implementation.

notes: All three features (eventloop-proxy-wake, conditional-repaint-dormant, wake-on-gui-event) passed review. The implementation correctly adds EventLoopProxy wake mechanism with 2-second grace period before dormancy. Unit tests cover idle detection, conditional repaint, grace period bounds, and dormancy timing. Manual user testing validation is required per the validation contract for CPU measurement and timing tests.
